description: External open-source references studied for resource-estimation and simulation-first reasoning. These are independent third-party projects. CodeWorld Observatory does not bundle, vendor, redistribute, or modify them, and claims no affiliation, partnership, or endorsement.

references.name: Cirq
references.studied_for: Circuit construction and simulation primitives as a mental model for intervention composition.

references.name: qsim
references.studied_for: High-performance simulation patterns for heavier consequence spaces.

references.name: Qualtran
references.studied_for: Explicit resource estimation and algorithm decomposition discipline.

references.name: OpenFermion
references.studied_for: Future scientific branch — fermionic systems and Hamiltonians.

references.name: TensorFlow Quantum
references.studied_for: Future hybrid quantum-classical research branch (not in app runtime).

boundary: This annex is a research and interpretation layer. It does not claim quantum advantage, does not run production quantum workloads, does not imply affiliation with Google, and does not modify CodeWorld's core simulation-first repository governance thesis.
